# Workflows Folder

This folder contains reusable process workflows—step-by-step guides for planning, design, and project management tasks.

## How to Use

- Add new workflows using the provided template for consistency.
- Reference workflows in agents, skills, and onboarding documentation.
- Update workflows as your team’s processes evolve.

## Workflow File Structure

Each workflow should follow the workflow [template](WORKFLOW-template.md)
